claim_boundary: This artifact verifies only the submitted Newton-Kantorovich-style numerical inequality fields. It does not prove Jet-Laplacian rank stability, spectral stability, gravity, continuum limits, Navier-Stokes blow-up, or any global theorem.
nonclaims: No proof of Jet-Laplian rank stability is claimed.
No interval enclosure of a Jet-Laplacian operator is claimed.
No certified inverse or pseudoinverse bound is claimed.
No Lipschitz theorem for distance_axis parameters is claimed.
No Navier-Stokes singularity or self-similar blow-up result is claimed.
